title: Bail Denied
lore: Dragged up from the swamp gas at the bottom of the market and chained in a gold frame so he can't crawl back down. One eye stays open, always, watching the floor.
omen: The bottom is a place. I live there.
factoid: Peat bogs preserve corpses so completely that 'bog bodies' thousands of years old still keep their skin, hair, and features.
